resources.string: No activity yet — pull to refresh.
Follow people to see their activity here.
Comment unavailable, showing thread from start
Search discussions, or filter by media, category, author or sort
What do you want to discuss?
You\'re not watching anything right now.
You\'re not reading anything right now.
Open menu to manage library status
Use pure black backgrounds in dark mode to save power on OLED screens
Pick a seed color to generate your unique theme palette.
Rests on the bottom edge with rounded top corners
Detached pill with margins from the edges
Show destination titles beside each icon
Shows the original image shape for your own profile only
Adds a themed background behind the avatar
Draws a ring and background behind avatars
Tint the app with a user\'s chosen color when you visit their profile. Profiles using the default color keep your theme.
A softer, 4-leaf clover alternative to a square
Show the avatar image in its natural shape
Choose your preferred streaming platform for the Up Next widget icon
New episodes for shows you\'re watching
Alerts when Episode 1 airs for shows you plan to watch

Wait this many minutes after an episode airs before notifying you. Useful if your streaming site posts episodes after the official airing time. Notifications fire on a ~15-minute check, so the actual delay may be a few minutes longer than the value you pick.
When someone replies to your comment
New comments in threads you subscribed to
When someone mentions you in a comment
New episodes for shows you\'re watching
Alerts when Episode 1 airs for shows you plan to watch
When someone replies to your comment
New comments in threads you subscribed to
When someone mentions you in a comment
Notification permission was revoked. Tap to open settings.
Accounts, adult content, languages, score format
Enable opening anilist.co links directly in app
Receive prompts for updates on launch
Get early access to new features
Notifications when a new version of AniSync is available
Version %1$s is available. Tap to update.
Applies to every cover shown in the app. Higher quality looks sharper but uses more data and storage.
Fit the number of columns to the screen size
Select a title to see details
Maximum sharpness everywhere. Best on Wi-Fi.
Smallest, fastest. Visible blur on detail screens.
Clearing cache will remove cached images and temporary data. Your library and settings will not be affected.
These options changed on the AniList website and differ from this device:
Keep this device\'s changes, or use the website\'s?
Logging out will remove your session. You can sign in again at any time.
Sign in to another AniList account
Couldn\'t sign in. Please try again.
%1$s will be removed from this device. You can sign in again at any time.
Data provided by AniList GraphQL API
Made with love for anime fans
AniSync is built with the following open source libraries:
All libraries are used in accordance with their respective licenses.
Are you sure you want to log out?
AniSync wouldn\'t be possible without the amazing open source community and the following contributors:
The anime and manga database that powers this app
All the developers who maintain the libraries we use
Thank you for using AniSync and providing valuable feedback
Made with love for anime fans everywhere.
Removes the Developer Tools entry. Tap the version label seven times in About to bring it back.
The Developer Tools entry will be removed from Settings. You can re-enable it by tapping the version label seven times in About.
For bug reports — copies version, Android version, and ABIs to your clipboard
Something went wrong while loading your profile.
We could not load this user profile right now. The account may be private, unavailable, or temporarily rate-limited.
Status activity content will appear here.
Message activity content will appear here.
List activity content will appear here.
Anime list content will appear here.
Manga list content will appear here.
Detailed stats content will appear here.
Please enable notifications in system settings.
Remove this entry from your library?
The ultimate companion for Anime & Manga tracking, powered by AniList.
Sign in to access your library and discover new favorites.
By continuing, you agree to our Terms of Service.
Tap a year. Tap a second to make a range.
Tap another year for a range
Tap any year to start over
View your 7-day anime schedule at a glance
Quick access to your next episode
Customize how your Up Next widget looks and behaves
Number of entries shown in expanded view
Display countdown timer for upcoming episodes
Include episodes that have already aired
Show entries from your Planning list
Activity heatmap with %1$d activities over the past year

To open AniList links directly in AniSync, please enable supported web links in your Android Settings.

1. Tap 'Open Settings'
2. Find and tap 'AniSync' in the list
3. Tap 'Add link'
4. Select 'anilist.co' and save.

To open AniList links directly in AniSync, please enable supported web links for this app in your Android Settings.

1. Tap 'Open Settings'
2. Tap 'Add link'
3. Select 'anilist.co' and save.
When someone replies to your activity
When someone mentions you in an activity
When someone likes your activity or reply
When someone sends you a direct message
Your reply will be permanently removed and can\'t be recovered.
The thread and all of its comments will be permanently removed and can\'t be recovered.
You have unsaved edits. Leave anyway?
This permanently deletes your review. This cannot be undone.
Review must be at least %1$d characters long. Do not pad your reviews to meet this requirement.
Summary must be between %1$d and %2$d characters.
Please make sure to read the review guidelines before publishing.
Where attached photos, GIFs, and videos are hosted
AniList does not host uploads. Pick a third-party host to use when attaching media inside threads, replies, status posts, messages, and bios.
Permanent free hosting, up to 200 MB per file
Find it under Manage Account on catbox.moe
Bind uploads to your Catbox account so you can view and delete them later. Leave empty to upload anonymously.
Temporary hosting on the same network as Catbox
Any service that accepts a multipart POST
e.g. data.url — empty if response is the URL
Leave the JSON path empty if the server returns the URL directly in the response body.
Catbox rejected this file. Try a different file, or switch to Litterbox in Settings → Media upload.
Hide this entry from other users
Do not display in global recent updates
This thread is locked and cannot receive new replies.
AniSync is a passion project built entirely in my free time. If you enjoy using the app, consider sponsoring to help keep development alive.
Buy me a coffee to support AniSync

AniSync is free, ad-free, and open source — made in my spare time. If it brightens your day, you can buy me a coffee. Monthly supporters get their name and avatar shown here; share a social (like your AniList) and I\'ll link it too.
Be the first — Become a $%1$d supporter
Couldn\'t load sponsors. Pull to retry.
Start tracking anime by adding shows from the Discover tab
Start tracking manga by adding titles from the Discover tab
Try adjusting your search or filters
Add anime or manga to your favorites from their detail pages
Check your internet connection and try again
Connect your AniList account to sync your library across devices
Check back later or add more shows to your list
Add currently airing anime to your watching list to see upcoming episodes
Character information is not available for this title
Be the first to start a conversation
Be the first to share your thoughts
This is a test message for error code %s.
Thread depth: %d levels deep. Tap to go back.
Show only shows on your list
No episodes air on this day.
No shows from your list air on this day.
Collapse or expand the list pane
Select a thread to read it here
Select a status to view it here
Select a notification to open it here
Select a setting to adjust it here
